verdicts.criterion: User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.
evidence: Toast appeared reading 'Submitted successfully' within 250ms. Network panel shows one POST /api/submit returning 201
User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.

verdicts.criterion: Form validation rejects empty required fields with an inline error message.
evidence: Filled name='Alice', email='alice@example.com'. Clicked Submit. ... Re-filled valid input. Clicked Submit twice within ~100ms.
Form validation rejects empty required fields with an inline error message.
verdicts.notes: Verify pass only exercised valid-input submission; empty-required-field path is not observable from this output.

verdicts.criterion: Logout button signs the user out and redirects to /login.
evidence: (not tested — verify session interrupted before reaching logout test)
Logout button signs the user out and redirects to /login.
verdicts.notes: Verify run did not exercise the logout flow.
